title: SEARCH 5 — Sisters follow trail to bedroom, find Ginger on bunk bed
prompt: Medium shot in @bedroom-sisters. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT tip-toe in, fingers on lips, eyes wide. @Ginger sits on the lower bunk bed in the center back, paws on top of the chewed-open package, looking guilty. Sara (whispering): "There she is!" Eva (hands on hips, mock-stern): "Ginger! What did you do?" Ginger: "Woof!" Apologetic head-tilt. Warm pink-lavender bedroom light, the shared girls' bunk bed visible.
